dashboard.yourArea: This is your dedicated workspace. Role-specific tools will live here.

hero.description: Do replaces scattered WhatsApp groups with one structured space for school communication — content, polls, and an AI tutor for every teacher, built to work even when the connection doesn't.

01.title: Offline-First Access
01.description: Content and polls sync automatically the moment you're back online. No lost announcements, no missed updates — even on an unreliable connection.

02.title: AI Avatar Tutor
02.description: Every teacher can build a consent-based AI tutor of themselves, grounded only in their own course material — so students always have someone to ask.

03.title: Structured Communication
03.description: One space for announcements, class content, and instant polls — built for a school, not a group chat. No more messages lost in the scroll.

04.title: Consent & Safety by Design
04.description: Every AI interaction is disclosed, every consent is logged, and every teacher controls their own avatar and voice. Trust isn't an afterthought here.

howItWork.subtitle: How Do works

steps.title: Set up your school
steps.description: Create your school's workspace and invite teachers and students. No technical setup, no IT department required.

steps.title: Teachers share & build their AI tutor
steps.description: Upload class content and, if you choose, record a consent-based AI tutor grounded only in your own material.

steps.title: Students learn, anytime
steps.description: Content and polls sync automatically, even offline. Students can ask the AI tutor a question whenever they need to.

howItWork.cookieNotice: This website uses cookies — please accept them to continue using all features.

infrastructure.description: Do is designed around one hard constraint: connectivity you can't count on. Content, class materials, and polls sync the moment a connection returns, so a shaky signal never stands between a student and their class.

metrics.note: Roadmap targets, not live data — we're early, and we'd rather be honest about that than look further along than we are.

items.label: Schools we're building toward by Year 5
Target AI tutor response time per turn
WhatsApp groups needed once you're on Do

integration.description: Sign in with Google or Microsoft. Pay by mobile money, card, or invoice. No new accounts to manage.
integration.note: Roadmap integrations - not all live yet.

security.description: Enterprise-grade security isn't optional. It's built into every layer of our platform, from infrastructure to application.

soc2.title: SOC 2 Type II
soc2.description: Independently audited security controls with continuous monitoring.

encryption.title: End-to-end encryption
encryption.description: AES-256 encryption for data at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit.

zerotrust.title: Zero-trust architecture
zerotrust.description: Every request is authenticated and authorized. No exceptions.

gdprhipaa.title: GDPR & HIPAA
gdprhipaa.description: Full compliance with data protection and healthcare regulations.

developer.description: Before a school signs on, someone reasonably asks about data ownership, consent, and security. Here's what we can tell you today — plainly, not in a sales deck.

consent.title: Consent-logged AI
consent.description: Every avatar interaction disclosed and recorded.

scale.title: Built for scale
scale.description: Isolated data between schools, by design.

ownership.label: Data Ownership
ownership.content:
Your school's data belongs to your school.

- Full export available anytime, in standard formats
- No lock-in: leaving Do means taking your data with you
- Deleted data is actually deleted, not just hidden

consent.label: Consent & AI
consent.content:
Every AI avatar interaction is disclosed and logged.

- Teachers opt in explicitly before any avatar or voice is created
- Students are told they're talking to an AI, every session
- Full transcripts available for teacher and admin review

security.label: Security
security.content:
Built with standard safeguards from day one, not bolted on later.

- TLS encryption in transit
- Role-based access control per school (admin/teacher/student)
- Per-school data isolation in a multi-tenant setup

testimonial.label: Why we're building this
testimonial.founderQuote: I built Do because I watched schools drown in WhatsApp groups. Important messages lost, no structure, nothing working when the connection dropped. I wanted something that actually fit how schools work, not another chat app.
testimonial.whereBody: Early. Building in public. Looking for our first pilot schools.
values: Grounded in the Teacher's Own Material

pricing.description: Start free for a single classroom. Scale up when you're ready for the AI Avatar Tutor.
pricing.noteAll: All plans include offline-first sync, TLS encryption, and role-based access control.
pricing.disclaimer: FCFA is our base price. Other currencies are approximate conversions and may not match your bank's rate exactly. Figures are early estimates, subject to change before launch.

plans.name: Free
plans.description: A single classroom or very small school

plans.name: Standard
plans.description: Ready to pilot the AI Avatar Tutor

cta.description: Join the waitlist and be among the first schools to try Do - structured communication, offline-first, with a consent-based AI tutor built from your own teachers' material.
cta.previewDescription: Grounded in their material. Always disclosed.

about.intro: Do gives every school one structured space for communication — content, polls, and a consent-based AI tutor for each teacher. Built offline-first for the classrooms that need it most.
about.mission: Schools across CEMAC lose important messages in group chats, have no structure, and go dark the moment the connection drops. We're building the calm, reliable alternative — designed for how schools actually work.
about.teamBody: We're early and small, shipping in the open and looking for our first pilot schools. If that's you, we'd love to talk.
about.founderQuote: I built Do because I watched schools drown in WhatsApp groups. Important messages lost, no structure, nothing working when the connection dropped. I wanted something that actually fits how schools work, not another chat app.
about.founderBio: Ermon spent years inside classrooms and school operations across Cameroon and the CEMAC region before starting Do. He cares about the unglamorous things — offline sync, consent, and data that stays yours — because that's what makes a tool trustworthy enough for a school.

contact.intro: Pilots, partnerships, press, or just a question — reach the team and we'll get back to you.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your school and what you're hoping for…
contact.note: No spam. We reply to every serious message.

aiTutor.intro: Every teacher can build a consent-based AI tutor of themselves — grounded only in their own course material. Students always have someone to ask, even when the connection drops.

steps.title: Consent first
steps.description: Teachers opt in explicitly before any avatar or voice is created. Nothing is generated without a clear yes.

steps.title: Grounded in your material
steps.description: The tutor is built only from content the teacher uploads — never from the open internet, so answers stay on-topic and trustworthy.

steps.title: Always disclosed
steps.description: Students are told, every session, that they're talking to an AI. No pretending to be a human.

safety.title: Consent-logged
safety.description: Every avatar interaction is disclosed and recorded, with transcripts available to teachers and admins.

safety.title: On-topic only
safety.description: The tutor can only answer from the teacher's own material — no off-script answers, no web drift.

safety.title: Role-based access
safety.description: Teachers control their own avatar and voice. Schools stay isolated from one another.

aiTutor.ctaTitle: Bring the AI tutor to your school
aiTutor.ctaBody: Join the waitlist and be among the first schools to pilot a tutor that actually fits how your classrooms work.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what we collect, why, and the choices you have. Do is built for schools, so we treat student data with extra care.
privacy.dataBody: We collect account details (email, role, school), the class content you upload, and the consented AI tutor interactions. We do not sell personal data.
privacy.useBody: To provide offline-first sync, run the AI tutor you consent to, and keep your school's workspace working. Everything is scoped to your school.
privacy.rightsBody: Your school owns its data and can export or delete it at any time. Students and parents are told when they're speaking to an AI, every session.
privacy.contactBody: Questions about your data? Email privacy@do.app and we'll respond within 30 days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of Do. By using the product you agree to them. They're written in plain language on purpose.
terms.useBody: Use Do for legitimate school communication. Don't misuse others' data, upload unlawful content, or attempt to circumvent safety controls.
terms.accountsBody: Access is role-based: admins, school admins, staff, teachers, students, and parents each see only what their role permits.
terms.liabilityBody: Do is in active development. We aim for reliability but make no uptime guarantees while the product is early.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms and will notify schools before material changes take effect.

security.title: Security & Trust
security.intro: Trust isn't a feature we bolt on later. Here's how Do is built to keep school data safe from day one.
security.encryptBody: Data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Every request is authenticated and authorized.
security.consentBody: Every AI tutor interaction is disclosed and logged. Teachers opt in before any avatar or voice is created; students are told they're talking to an AI.
security.isolationBody: Schools are isolated from each other by design in a multi-tenant setup, with role-based access control (admin / teacher / student).
security.certBody: We target SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR and HIPAA-aligned practices as the product matures.

footer.description: Structured school communication and an AI tutor for every teacher — built offline-first, in English and French.
footer.status: In active development — building in public

notfound.title: This page doesn't exist.
notfound.description: The page you're looking for has been moved, deleted, or never existed. Let's get you back to something that works.

error.title: Something broke
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or head back home.

waitlist.title: Join the waitlist
waitlist.description: Be among the first schools to experience Do. No spam, no noise — just one message when it's your turn.
waitlist.successDescription: We'll be in touch when spots open up. Until then, we're building in public.
waitlist.note: No credit card required. We respect your privacy.
